title: Rikki og mændene
writer: Johannes Allen, Jon Iversen, Sara Kordon
actors: Ghita Nørby, Poul Reichhardt, Holger Juul Hansen
plot: A free-spirited young woman decides, in an effort to be independent and pay her bills, to charge her lovers for her affections. When they decline, she then goes the next step and starts picking up men in bars.
